open_repo_assist_prs.title: [Repo Assist] feat: add ExecApprovalsEvaluator policy evaluation step

open_repo_assist_prs.note: Addresses issue #281 items #5 and #6. 3 new tests.

open_repo_assist_prs.title: [Repo Assist] fix(security): stop leaking ex.Message in node client, device capability, and approval prompts
open_repo_assist_prs.note: Created 2026-05-11 run. Fixes 4 remaining ex.Message leaks not covered by merged #294.

open_repo_assist_prs.title: [Repo Assist] chore(deps): align Microsoft.Windows.SDK.BuildTools to 10.0.28000.1839 in CommandPalette
open_repo_assist_prs.note: Created 2026-05-11 run. PR #282 updated main tray projects but missed CommandPalette Directory.Packages.props.

259.note: CI failure is pre-existing flaky integration test

281.note: Confirmed isolation bug: OPENCLAW_TRAY_APPDATA_DIR vs OPENCLAW_TRAY_DATA_DIR

283.note: Confirmed root cause: missing ExtendsContentIntoTitleBar + repeated TryBringToFront. Linked to PR #285.

288.note: Review comment: HttpClient anti-pattern, dependency surface, TtsCapability conflict

99.note: Voice mode architecture context: STT/TTS provider structure from PR #288, WebView bridge status, WinRT built-in STT suggestion

310.note: Review comment: non-atomic TryClearDeviceToken write, Kill(entireProcessTree: false) concern, .squad docs dominate PR size

cmdpal-pkg-version-align.description: Align CommandPalette Directory.Packages.props Microsoft.Windows.SDK.BuildTools from 10.0.26100.4188 to 10.0.28000.1839. PR #282 missed this file.

wsl-cancellation-kill.description: Added catch(OperationCanceledException) block without 'when' guard to kill process tree on caller cancellation in WslExeCommandRunner.RunProcessAsync. MERGED 2026-05-10.

nuget-cache-key.description: Filed as issue #302; closed by steipete as completed (fix applied manually).

wsl-conf-section-probe.description: Added mountFsTab=false and [time] useWindowsTimezone=true to wsl.conf template. Made IsAlreadyConfiguredAsync probe section-aware with awk. 3 new tests.

exec-approvals-evaluator.description: ExecApprovalsEvaluator (policy evaluation phase). 33 new tests. Based on PR #295.

notes: PR #295 (AlexAlves87) ExecApprovalsStore read path — open, needs review/merge before PR #296

PR #305 (ranjeshj) fix: setup flow, connection page, and chat token bugs — MERGED 2026-05-11
PR #307 (indierawk2k2/Copilot) fix(onboarding): verify bootstrap message rendered before consuming one-shot gate — MERGED 2026-05-11

PR #296 (Repo Assist) ExecApprovalsEvaluator — open draft, depends on PR #295
PR #301 (Repo Assist) fix(wsl): wsl.conf missing settings + section-aware probe — open draft
PR #306 (Repo Assist) fix(security): remaining ex.Message leaks — open draft
PR TBD (Repo Assist) cmdpal version align — created 2026-05-11, branch repo-assist/eng-cmdpal-pkg-version-align-2026-05-11
Issue #281 remaining items: #3 (operator pairing auth), #8 (DeviceToken vs NodeDeviceToken)
Issue #191 open as tracker for remaining bridge integration
ExecApprovals pipeline: input validation (master), normalization (master), store read path (PR #295), evaluator (PR #296), coordinator/handler (future)
PR #310 review notes: TryClearDeviceToken uses non-atomic File.WriteAllText (should be temp+rename); proc.Kill(entireProcessTree: false) may leave WSL child processes alive

test_baseline.note: Both test suites run on Linux. build.ps1 requires Windows. Baselines from 2026-05-10.
